headline: AT&T Teams Up With TGL for Seamless Coverage: Can it Aid Shares?
summary: T powers The Golf League with advanced connectivity, delivering seamless gameplay, live broadcasts and fan engagement at the SoFi Center.

headline: Twilio Becomes the Only Cloud Communications Provider with Direct 10DLC and Toll-Free Connections Across All Major Carriers in the United States and Canada
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 24, 2026--Twilio (NYSE: TWLO), the customer engagement platform that drives real-time, personalized experiences for today’s leading brands, announced it is now the only Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS) provider to offer direct connections across all major carriers in the United States and Canada.

headline: Infobip Bolsters Fraud Protection for Enterprises with T-Mobile Network API Offerings
summary: VODNJAN, Croatia, March 24, 2026--Global AI-first cloud communications platform Infobip is extending security measures for enterprise customers as a go-to-market partner. Now, T-Mobile’s network APIs works seamlessly with Infobip’s platform to enhance user verification with the goal of reducing fraudulent activity.

headline: Amazon's Zoox to debut robotaxis in Austin, Miami later this year as it awaits paid ride approval
summary: It marks the latest expansion for Amazon's Zoox self-driving unit, which opened rides to the public in some parts of Las Vegas and San Francisco last year.

headline: AT&T rolls out major upgrade for customers as it rivals T-Mobile
summary: The wireless market is rapidly evolving as carriers double down on attracting and retaining price-conscious customers. In response, AT&T, struggling with rising customer losses, has made a bold upgrade to a digital service for customers – a move that gives T-Mobile a run for its money. ...
